arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico de Madrid, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Camavinga, Brahim, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe. Ancelotti will likely choose Tchouameni and Camavinga for his midfield, with Brahim and Rodrygo potentially playing on the flanks and helping the two midfielders whenever Atletico control the ball.

arts.sum: Atletico Madrid make the short trip to the Bernabeu to take on Real Madrid this evening. The Spanish sides go head-to-head in the last 16 of the Champions League in the latest instalment of the Madrid rivalry. Evenly matched this season, just two points separate the sides in the La Liga table. arts.ttl: ‘I respect him a lot’: Ancelotti relishes Simeone rivalry in Champions League
arts.sum: Atlético travel to Bernabéu for last-16 first leg ‘It’s a special match in terms of emotions and pressure’ As Real Madrid prepare to host Atlético Madrid in a city derby in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday, Carlo Ancelotti said he is looking forward to another battle against his rival Diego Simeone. Heading into their 27th clash, with the two managers having faced each other more often than any other rival in their careers, they are tied at nine wins each along with eight draws.
